title: Ordering at a Coffee Shop
learningGoal: The learner will verbally order items at a cafe using Katakana loan words and the polite request phrase 'onegaishimasu'.
instructions: In this speaking activity, you are ordering at a Japanese cafe. You will be prompted to order different items from the menu. Speak clearly, pronounce the Katakana words with a Japanese rhythm (not an English accent), and use polite phrases.

contentItems.text: Remember to use 'Sumimasen' to get the staff's attention before you order.

speakingPrompt: Follow the prompts and place your order verbally.
scenario: You walk up to the counter at Cafe Sakura. The staff greets you. You are ready to order.

subTasks.prompt: Get the staff's attention by saying 'Excuse me'.

sampleResponse.targetText: コーヒー、おねがいします。

subTasks.prompt: Change your mind and order a sandwich instead.

sampleResponse.targetText: サンドイッチ、おねがいします。

subTasks.prompt: The staff hands you your order and says 'Hai, douzo'. Thank them.

sampleResponse.targetText: ありがとうございます。

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: コーヒー、おねがいします。
サンドイッチ、おねがいします。
ありがとうございます。

requiredKeywords: ありがとうございます
acceptableParaphrases: For st004, just 'Arigatou' is acceptable but less polite.

criteria.name: Katakana Pronunciation
criteria.description: Did the learner pronounce 'Coffee' and 'Sandwich' using Japanese phonetics?

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: すみません。コーヒー、おねがいします。サンドイッチ、おねがいします。ありがとうございます。

feedbackRules.onPass: Great job! Your cafe ordering skills are perfect.
feedbackRules.onFail: Please try again. Ensure you are using 'onegaishimasu' after the item you want to order.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort! Work on pronouncing Katakana words without your native English accent.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: いらっしゃいませ。すみません。コーヒー、おねがいします。サンドイッチ、おねがいします。ありがとうございます。

hintText: Elongate the 'o' and 'i' sounds when saying Koohii.
commonMistakes: Pronouncing Koohii with a short English 'o'.
